item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 011800Z AUTO VRB03KT 9999 ///TCU 17/16 Q1020 TEMPO 4000 -TSRA SCT050CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 011700Z 0118/0218 18007KT 9999 FEW038 BKN094 OVC120 PROB40 TEMPO 0118/0119 -SHRA SCT050TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0118/0119 21010G25KT 4000 -TSRA SCT050CB BECMG 0207/0209 20010KT TEMPO 0210/0218 -SHRA SCT060TCU PROB30 0216/0218 4000 SHRA SCT060CB
